query:
-- 查詢 IP 貼文中的爆款數量
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_posts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN likes >= 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as viral_posts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN likes >= 5000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as super_viral_posts
FROM ip_posts;
